Let $a_i$, $i = 1, 2, 3, 4$, be real numbers such that $a_1 + a_2 + a_3 + a_4 =
0$. Show that for arbitrary real numbers $b_i$, $i = 1, 2, 3$, the equation
$$ a_1 + b_1 x + 3a_2 x^2 + b_2 x^3 + 5a_3 x^4 + b_3 x^5 + 7a_4 x^6 = 0 $$
has at least one real root which is on the interval $-1 \le x \le 1$.
